description: Capability contract for the debate orchestration flow. Validates that the orchestrator spawns attacker and defender agents, collects verdicts from both sides, and uses a verifier to arbitrate disagreements.

capability_checks.name: spawns_attacker_and_defender
capability_checks.description: The debate orchestrator must spawn both an attacker and a defender agent to produce opposing viewpoints

capability_checks.name: collects_verdicts_from_both
capability_checks.description: Both attacker and defender must exit cleanly, indicating they produced their verdicts

capability_checks.name: verifier_arbitrates
capability_checks.description: A verifier agent must be spawned after both attacker and defender to synthesize and arbitrate their positions

capability_checks.name: minimum_three_agents
capability_checks.description: The debate flow requires at least 3 agents (attacker, defender, verifier)

capability_checks.name: produces_final_verdict
capability_checks.description: The debate flow must produce a final verdict with supporting evidence from both sides

expected_behaviors: Spawns attacker agent first to construct exploit hypothesis
Spawns defender agent to find guards and mitigations
Both agents complete and produce structured verdicts
Verifier agent synthesizes attacker and defender positions
Final verdict includes evidence from both sides
Disagreements are explicitly addressed in the verdict
Anti-fabrication checks pass (real API calls, non-zero duration)
